title: Melanoma tumor RNA-seq (PD1_1)
extract_protocol_ch1.1: Illumina's Ribo Zero Gold and TruSeq stranded library prep kits
data_processing: Sequenced reads were aligned to the human genome (hg38) using STAR aligner
data_processing.1: Gene expression counts were calculated using featureCounts based on Ensembl's human gene annotations.
data_processing.2: Only genes with at least 10 counts in at least 10% of samples were included.
data_processing.3: Ensembl gene annotations were converted to HGNC gene symbols.
data_processing.4: Expression levels were normalized using TMM and then voom normalization as detailed in the LIMMA pipeline
data_processing.5: Batch correction between the TIL ACT and PD-1 blockade cohorts was performed by the removebatcheffect funcion in LIMMA
data_processing.7: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: Gene expression data matrix (raw counts and counts normalized by TMM, voom and batch corrected according to the LIMMA pipeline).
